desc: Materialises an EnclosureRectangle as four walls on a specified Level + WallType.
summary: Materialises an EnclosureRectangle as four walls on a specified Level + WallType. Pure rectangle maths are upstream.
usecase: Materialise an enclosure rectangle (IPS, services-boxing, beam boxing) in one atomic step.
precondition: Active document open; Level exists; WallType resolves (or default-wall-type is available); height > 0; four corners present.
postcondition: Four Wall elements added to the model inside one committed Transaction. Their ids returned in tracker output.
logictree: 1) User or Bot supplies four corner XYZ values (feet) + Resolver_HeightMm + Resolver_LevelId + Resolver_WallTypeId?. 2) Validate preconditions — level exists; height > 0; wallTypeId valid (fall back to Doc.GetDefaultElementTypeId(ElementTypeGroup.WallType) only if Resolver_WallTypeId is null — never silently). 3) Open Transaction 'Create enclosure walls'. 4) For each of (A→B, B→C, C→D, D→A) call Wall.Create(doc, Line.CreateBound(p0_on_level, p1_on_level), wallTypeId, levelId, heightFt, 0, false, false) and collect the result. 5) If any Wall.Create returns null → tracker.Fail + WireError + rollback. 6) Commit. 7) Bot: JSON {ok, wall_ids, level_id, height_mm}. User: toast 'Placed 4 enclosure walls on level {level.Name}.' 8) Any exception → tracker.Fail(ex); WireFault {corners, level_id, height_mm, wall_type_id}.

preprompts: Placing four walls around enclosure rectangle…
thinkingsteps: Creating Wall A→B, B→C, C→D, D→A…
